content: the retry battle mechanic seems a bit broken, what's preventing you from restarting battle till you get a crucial death resistance on one turn?
It’s a pain in the ass
Also it’s fixed rng so you can’t just repeat the exact same action and hope for a different result
Dr is seeded
wdym
does that mean the seed for like my 3rd dr is set
if you fail a dr and you retry it, you will forever fail it unless you change cards you played
Im late but thank u both so so much!
will the one in a million refresh at the end of the timer or will it just go away
the seed used for rng is static and determined at the start of battle, so no matter how many times you retry it'll always be the same set seed
however all rng-based events in battle run off the same function
so you can advance the rng via taking actions that call it (usually dealing damage, but stuff like random posses and deck shuffling can affect it as well)
this means if you play cards in different orders or play different cards you can get different results
if you repeat the same set of actions in the exact same order then the result will always be the same
but yes, it's possible to fish for dr procs by playing cards differently to advance the rng seed
Al and Draco coded gameply
Rotates. This week chaos,next aq

i love blue people
None of faint enlightenment realistically help her early game play

I was wondering. I see a lot of people suggest going for +12 blade when switching to wods. Is that a suggestion for story progression? For dtide wouldn't it be better to get 4 E3 wods, one for every team?

1. Yes
2. Maybe. Do you think an E3 wod would get you 5 more points? It's less likely than you think
Or even just get a bunch of e0 ssr for most chars?
So. Alert 1 and 2 require at most levels and maybe a bit of soulforge. No matter what, it's easier to get levels or soulforge or skill levels than wods for 1 and 2.

Alert 3 requires decent team-building and your team at least lvl 60, soulforge 3-5, skill levels at least 5 on the dps, etc. Wods can help close the gaps here but it's more about having a reasonable game plan and keyflare for rouse than anything else

In my opinion, wods in dtide only really really start to matter in alert 4, and at that point you need the +12 blade *and* all those e3 you're considering. Will a bunch of e0 get you from A3 to A4? Maybe others will disagree but I don't think so
